svg.title: SHL Assessment Recommender — full system architecture
svg.desc: Pipeline from POST /chat through scope guard, state extraction, intent detection, workflow router, to specialized agents and output validator

g.text: role · seniority · skills · constraints · prior recs
reconstructed from full messages[] every call
BM25 recall (top 80) → embedding rerank → metadata filter
catalog data injected · hallucination guard in prompt
drops any invented assessment or URL
